about.metaDescription: Meet CARIZO — a modern automotive platform built by enthusiasts. Learn who we are and what drives us.
about.heroDesc: We are a team of automotive and technology enthusiasts who decided to change the way Poles buy and sell cars.
about.story1: CARIZO was born from a single conviction — a car transaction should be simple, transparent and safe for both sides. Old classifieds portals offered scans of faded ads from the 90s. We wanted something more.
about.story2: We build tools that genuinely help: intelligent search, valuations based on market data, verified dealer accounts and direct contact without intermediaries. Every feature is thought through — from the main photo to the financing installment calculator.
about.story3: Today CARIZO means thousands of active listings, a network of verified dealers and a growing community of people for whom a car is more than a means of transport.
about.valueSecurityDesc: We verify dealer accounts and monitor listings so your transaction is safe from the very first click.
about.valueTechnologyDesc: We build modern tools that save time and give an edge to both buyers and sellers.
about.valueTransparencyDesc: No hidden fees or tricks. Clear prices, fair rules and the full listing history in one place.
about.valuePassionDesc: We are car enthusiasts ourselves. We build CARIZO the way we would want to use such a platform.
about.bottomDesc: Our team is happy to answer any question — about the platform, cooperation or your account.

howItWorks.metaDescription: Learn how to sell and buy cars on CARIZO. Simple registration, safe listings and direct contact with the seller.
howItWorks.ogDescription: Sell or buy a car in a few simple steps. Register for free on CARIZO.
howItWorks.twitterDescription: Sell or buy a car in a few simple steps on CARIZO.
howItWorks.heroDesc: Sell and buy cars in a few simple steps.

sellSteps.title: Create an account
sellSteps.desc: Registration is free and takes less than a minute. You can choose a personal or business account.

sellSteps.title: Add a listing
sellSteps.desc: Fill in the form with the vehicle details, add photos and set a price. The system will suggest a market valuation.

sellSteps.title: Optional: promote
sellSteps.desc: Boost your listing's visibility by choosing the TOP, Premium or Featured package. Or publish for free.

sellSteps.title: Finalize the transaction
sellSteps.desc: Receive inquiries, negotiate and finalize the sale directly with the buyer.

buySteps.title: Search
buySteps.desc: Use the advanced search engine with filters for make, model, price, mileage and many other parameters.

buySteps.title: Follow
buySteps.desc: Save your favorite listings and set price alerts so you never miss an opportunity.

buySteps.title: Get in touch
buySteps.desc: Message the seller through the built-in messenger or call directly from the listing page.

buySteps.title: Arrange a viewing
buySteps.desc: Book a viewing appointment directly on the site and finalize the transaction safely.

faqs.a: Yes, a basic listing is completely free. Only the promotion options that increase visibility are paid.

faqs.q: How long is a listing visible?
faqs.a: A standard listing is active for 90 days. You can extend or refresh it (paid option).
Yes, listings go through system verification. Listings marked as VERIFIED have additionally been checked by our team.

faqs.q: How does the payment system work?
faqs.a: Payments are handled by ING IMOJE – a secure online payment system. We accept Visa/Mastercard cards, BLIK, bank transfers and other methods.

faqs.q: Can I remove a listing before it expires?
faqs.a: Yes, you can remove or hide a listing at any time from the „My listings" panel.

faqs.q: What should I do when I sell the car?
faqs.a: Mark the listing as sold using the „Mark as sold" button in the user panel. The listing will disappear from search results.

forBusiness.metaDescription: Connect your company with CARIZO and sync listings automatically via XML, CSV or API.
forBusiness.heroDesc: Sync your listings automatically. No manual adding.
forBusiness.formSub: Provide the basic details — we'll arrange the rest by email. If you have a link to an XML/CSV file with your offer, we'll check it right away.
forBusiness.previewOkSub: Synchronization will run automatically. After your application is approved (usually within 1 business day) we'll open an account for you and import the file.
forBusiness.noFeedSub: You didn't provide a file link — we'll contact you to arrange the integration details.
forBusiness.doneSubBefore: Your application has been submitted and is awaiting approval. We'll get back to you at
forBusiness.infoXmlDesc: We support both formats — just one link to a file you already export from your system.
forBusiness.infoCategoriesDesc: Cars, parts, machinery, trailers, tires — the feed itself indicates the category for each item.
forBusiness.infoSyncDesc: Once approved, your file is fetched periodically — new items appear without any effort on your part.
forBusiness.errorSubmitForm: Failed to submit the form. Please try again.
forBusiness.errorReadFile: Could not read the file at the given address.
forBusiness.errorSubmitApplication: Failed to submit the application. Please try again.

contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with the CARIZO team — email, help center and company details.
contact.heroDesc: Have a question about your account, payments or a listing? Write to us — we usually reply within 24 business hours.

help.metaDescription: CARIZO help center — find answers to the most common questions about selling, buying and transaction safety.
help.ogDescription: FAQ and tips for buyers and sellers on the CARIZO platform.
help.twitterDescription: FAQ and tips for buyers and sellers on the CARIZO platform.

groupKontoFaqs.q: How do I create an account on CARIZO?
groupKontoFaqs.a: Click the „Register" button in the top right corner of the page. Fill in the form with your name, email address and password. After registering, you'll receive an email with an activation link.

groupKontoFaqs.q: I forgot my password – what should I do?
groupKontoFaqs.a: On the login page, click „Forgot password". Enter your email address and we'll send you a password reset link.

groupKontoFaqs.q: How do I change my account details?
groupKontoFaqs.a: Go to Account settings available in the user panel. There you can change your name, phone number, address and other details.

groupKontoFaqs.q: How do I delete my account?
groupKontoFaqs.a: You can do this in Account settings → the „Danger zone" section. Remember that deleting your account is irreversible and will remove all your listings.

groupKontoFaqs.q: What's the difference between a personal and a business account?
groupKontoFaqs.a: A business account (Business) allows you to add more listings, display your company logo, manage multiple listings from a single panel and issue VAT invoices.

groupOgloszeniaFaqs.q: How do I add a listing?
groupOgloszeniaFaqs.a: Click „Add listing" in the menu. Fill in the vehicle details in the form: make, model, year, mileage, price and description. Add at least 3 photos. Click „Publish".

groupOgloszeniaFaqs.q: How much does adding a listing cost?
groupOgloszeniaFaqs.a: A basic listing is free. Only the promotion packages (TOP, Premium, Featured) that increase the offer's visibility are paid.

groupOgloszeniaFaqs.q: How long is a listing active?
groupOgloszeniaFaqs.a: A standard listing is active for 90 days. After that time you can refresh it (paid option) or publish it again.

groupOgloszeniaFaqs.q: Can I edit a published listing?
groupOgloszeniaFaqs.a: Yes, you can edit a listing at any time from the „My listings" panel. Changes are visible immediately.

groupOgloszeniaFaqs.q: How do I mark a car as sold?
groupOgloszeniaFaqs.a: In the „My listings" panel, click the handshake icon button next to the listing. Confirm in the dialog. The listing will disappear from search results.

groupOgloszeniaFaqs.q: How many photos can I add?
groupOgloszeniaFaqs.a: You can add up to 20 photos to a single listing. The first photo will be the main photo shown in search results. We recommend adding at least 8 photos.

groupPlatnosciFaqs.q: Which payment methods do you accept?
groupPlatnosciFaqs.a: We accept: Visa and Mastercard cards, BLIK, online bank transfers and other methods available through the ING IMOJE system.
Yes. Payments are handled by ING IMOJE – a certified payment operator. CARIZO does not store payment card data.

groupPlatnosciFaqs.q: How do I download an invoice?
groupPlatnosciFaqs.a: Invoices are available in the „Invoices" section of the user panel. Click the download button next to the selected invoice to save it in HTML or PDF format.
You can cancel a transaction with the „Pending" status from the „Transactions" section. Already completed transactions cannot be cancelled – in that case, contact technical support.

groupPlatnosciFaqs.q: When is a promotion payment activated?
groupPlatnosciFaqs.a: The promotion is activated immediately after the payment is confirmed by the payment system (usually within a few seconds).

groupBezpieczenstwoFaqs.q: How do I recognize a fake listing?
groupBezpieczenstwoFaqs.a: Red flags: a price significantly below market, no photos or photos taken from the internet, the seller asking for a transfer before a viewing, no option for phone contact, requests for payments via messengers.

groupBezpieczenstwoFaqs.q: How do I finalize a transaction safely?
groupBezpieczenstwoFaqs.a: Always inspect the car in person before buying. Meet in a safe place. Don't pay in advance without checking the vehicle. Check the vehicle history via CEPiK or other services.

groupBezpieczenstwoFaqs.q: How do I report a suspicious listing?
groupBezpieczenstwoFaqs.a: On the listing page, click the „Report" button (flag icon). Describe the problem and submit the report. Our team reviews reports within 24 hours.
Sellers can obtain the VERIFIED status after going through an identity verification process. Listings from verified sellers are marked with a special badge.

comingSoon.sub: We're working on something special. Check back soon.
